title: Controlled vocabulary
description: One file per open vocabulary used by an entity field: data/vocab/<id>.json, published verbatim at v1/vocab/<id>.json. Gives every code a human label and description so a consumer can render any value it encounters and fail visibly (not silently) on a code it does not recognize. `applies_to` names the entity field(s) this vocabulary governs; `open: true` means new codes may appear over time, so consumers should tolerate unknowns. tools/validate_data.py checks that every code actually used in the data appears here.

applies_to.description: Entity field(s) this vocabulary governs, e.g. 'camp.program_types'.

open.description: true = new codes may be added over time; consumers should tolerate unknown codes.
